description: seed bagging (3 seeds) + lightgbm + multi-model SHAP + calibration + class-weight search + 10pct HPO
notes: first validation run of the rewritten pipeline; public LB slightly below prior baseline (0.94960/0.94956)

v5: features from SHAP review + meta double-balance fix + weight-search guard; LB 0.94951 beats v4 (0.94915) ~= baseline (0.94960); categorical crosses were the win; meta class_weight=None backfired (guard fell back to simple_avg)

description: v6: meta reverted to balanced + LR-excluded blend candidates
notes: v6: fix meta class_weight, blend picks best of avg_all/avg_strong/meta/best_base; avg_strong (LR excluded) won OOF 0.94970 but LB 0.94944 < v5 0.94951 -- OOF gain did NOT transfer, LR diversity helps LB generalization; at noise floor ~0.9495

description: v7: 3-way crosses + cat-x-bin crosses + within-group deviations + numeric products
notes: v7: new feature families (3-way crosses, cat-x-bin, within-group deviations, numeric products). New feats rank HIGH in SHAP (stress_activity_sleepqual #2, stress_x_sleepcat #4, sleep_vs_stress #9) but base-learner OOF did NOT improve (final 0.94954 < v6 0.94970); the crosses just redistribute signal already captured (stress_x_activity fell #1->#5). LB 0.94934 < v5 0.94951 and v6 0.94944 -- confirms redundant, no lift; easy FE signal exhausted, at noise floor. Best remains v5 LB 0.94951
